overall.description: First-person night hiking footage along a rocky dirt trail illuminated by a warm flashlight or headlamp. The camera moves steadily forward past rock formations and vegetation in a natural outdoor setting under a dark sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt trail, illuminating the path ahead with a flashlight or headlamp

entered.detail: large rock formation with visible stratification running alongside the trail
narrow unpaved trail surface illuminated by the warm light source
tall grass and low bushes lining the left edge of the path
dark night sky visible above the silhouetted tree line in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a continuous night hike along a narrow dirt trail. A rocky cliff face runs along the right side while grass and vegetation line the left. The path is illuminated by a warm artificial light source from the camera's position, revealing the natural textures of the trail under a dark night sky. No other people or vehicles are present.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a secluded night trail that maintains a steady progression through a rugged natural corridor. It begins by advancing along a narrow dirt path, where a warm artificial light source cuts through the darkness to reveal the gritty textures of the ground. As the camera moves forward, the perspective is framed by a towering rocky cliff face on the right and wild grass and vegetation lining the left. The scene remains focused on the rhythmic traversal of the trail, with the light shifting across the stone and foliage before the path continues deeper into the dark outdoor environment.
